# User Intent Brief

## User Intent
- 把这组离线证据包转成一份可审阅的 article package outline。
- Keep it useful for article-workflow style drafting rather than free-form commentary.

## Hard Constraints
- Keep `source result`, `analysis brief`, and draft layers explicit.
- Keep citations attached to non-trivial claims.
- Keep image references separate from text-evidence claims.

## Non-goals
- Do not start drafting before the evidence pack is effectively frozen.
- Do not let writing quality outrun evidence quality.
